positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric forest scene. Central subject is a group of abstract, interlocking organic shapes that resemble glowing bioluminescent leaves and winding river paths. The style should be neo-futuristic linocut mixed with soft watercolor washes. Use a highly contrasted color palette of deep indigo, electric teal, emerald green, and warm saffron yellow. The composition should feature strong, symmetrical vertical elements drawing the eye upward, suggesting growth and infinity. Focus on clean silhouettes and negative space for maximum print contrast. Perfect for a centered apparel graphic, vector art quality, high detail.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, low resolution, artifacts, messy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient gradients, photorealistic, jpeg compression, logo, typography
